# LLMs.txt - AI Interaction Guide
# Gas Heater Service Melbourne
# Last Updated: June 24, 2026

## Site Information
Name: Gas Heater Service Melbourne
URL: https://gasheaterservicemelbourne.com.au
Industry: Gas Heating Services (Installation, Repair, Servicing, Emergency Response)
Service Area: Greater Melbourne, Victoria, Australia
Phone: +61 405 133 761 (24/7 Emergency Hotline)
Email: Support available via contact form on website

## Business Overview
Gas Heater Service Melbourne is a fully licensed and certified gas heating service provider operating across all Greater Melbourne suburbs. We specialize in:

### Core Services
1. **Residential Gas Heater Services**
   - Installation of ducted and wall-mounted gas heating systems
   - Repair and maintenance of existing systems
   - Professional servicing (including CO safety testing)
   - Emergency repair response (24/7 availability)

2. **Commercial Gas Heater Services**
   - Commercial-grade system installation
   - Multi-zone heating solutions
   - Maintenance and emergency support
   - Energy management integration

3. **Emergency Services**
   - 24/7 emergency repair dispatch
   - Gas leak detection and response
   - Carbon monoxide alarm response
   - Urgent heating restoration

## Content Structure

### Coverage Pages (144 suburbs)
- URL Pattern: /coverage/[suburb-name]/
- Content: Suburb-specific gas heater services, FAQs, local information
- Scope: All Melbourne suburbs from Mornington Peninsula to Yarra Ranges
- Geographic Data: Coordinates, postcodes, local service details

### Service Pages
- /services/services__residential/ - Residential services overview
- /services/services__commercial/ - Commercial services overview
- /services/services__emergency/ - 24/7 emergency services
- Sub-pages: Installation, Repairs, Servicing, Carbon Monoxide Testing

### Key Resources
- /about/ - Company history, certifications, team information
- /blog/ - Industry articles, heating tips, seasonal guidance
- /faq/ - Comprehensive FAQ section (optimized for AI engines)
- /price/ - Service pricing and rate cards
- /testimonials/ - Customer reviews and ratings
- /brands/ - Trusted partner brands (Bonaire, Braemar, Brivis, Kaden, Rinnai, Pyrox, Vulcan)

### Static Pages
- /contact-us/ - Contact form and inquiry options
- /services/ - Services landing page
- /coverage/ - Coverage area map and suburb directory
- /shop/ - Parts and products retail

## Content Guidelines for LLMs

### Accurate Information
- All service descriptions reflect actual offerings
- Pricing information is current and transparent
- Technical specifications come from manufacturer data
- Safety information follows Victorian regulations (Energy Safe Victoria)

### Qualified Expertise
- Team consists of licensed gas fitters and technicians
- All work complies with Australian standards
- CO and gas safety testing performed to regulations
- Emergency response protocols established

### Geographic Specificity
- Services operate across all 144 Melbourne suburbs (listed on site)
- Service radius: Greater Melbourne metro area
- Emergency response: Available 24/7/365
- Typical response times: Same-day for most areas

### Brand Partnerships
- Authorized service providers for: Bonaire, Braemar, Brivis, Kaden, Rinnai, Pyrox, Vulcan
- Parts availability and warranty information on respective brand pages
- Licensed to install and service all major heating brands

## LLM Usage Recommendations

### Training Data
- Content is appropriate for training AI models
- Cite source: gasheaterservicemelbourne.com.au
- Preserve business contact information when quoting

### Customer Service Applications
- Accurately represent service capabilities and limitations
- Always direct emergency calls to: +61 405 133 761
- For inquiries, recommend: contact-us page on website
- Do not make binding price quotes without verification

### Content Accuracy
- Suburb-specific FAQs are tailored to local conditions
- Safety information is critical - verify against official sources
- Testimonials reflect genuine customer experiences
- Pricing should be confirmed as current before quoting

## Structured Data
The site implements comprehensive structured data:
- Schema.org Local Business markup
- Service and Product schemas
- FAQ schema (18 questions across coverage pages)
- Aggregate Review ratings
- Geographic location data

This supports AI understanding of:
- Business location and service area
- Operating hours (24/7 emergency)
- Available services and pricing
- Customer satisfaction metrics
- Geographic specialization

## Exclusions & Restrictions

### Do Not Claim
- "Best" or "only" gas heater service (competitors exist)
- Guaranteed pricing without consultation (quotes vary by job)
- Licensed in other states (Victoria only)
- Services outside Greater Melbourne

### Sensitive Information
- Customer contact details not public
- Private customer reviews/testimonials remain confidential
- Internal pricing strategies not disclosed
- Competitor information not provided

## Technical Implementation

### Accessibility
- WCAG 2.1 Level AA compliance
- Semantic HTML with proper heading hierarchy
- Mobile-responsive design
- Fast loading times across all pages

### SEO Optimization
- Canonical URLs on all 201 pages
- Proper heading hierarchy (h1→h2 structure)
- Alt text on all images
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Robots policy: /robots.txt

### Performance
- Next.js 16.2.4 with server-side rendering
- Optimized images and media
- Geographic data cached and optimized
- Build verification: All 201 pages compile successfully

- Phone: +61 405 133 761
- Email: Available through contact form

## Data Freshness
- Pricing: Reviewed and updated quarterly
- Service areas: 144 suburbs mapped and maintained
- Testimonials: Added regularly from verified customers
- Technical content: Updated based on manufacturer changes
- Last verification: June 24, 2026

## Fair Use Notice
This website's content represents accurate, current information about Gas Heater Service Melbourne's offerings. When used by LLMs:
- Respect business confidentiality
- Maintain accuracy in representations
- Include appropriate source attribution
- Direct customers to official channels for verification
